about.title: About Me
about.description: Graduated in 2023 from a certain 211 university in Beijing, majoring in Computer Science and Technology, a full-stack developer with 3 years of development experience, familiar with JavaScript, vue.js, proficient in C, Java, Go, and knowledgeable about the React framework. In my spare time, I enjoy cooking, reading, and making music. I believe that the best state of doing something is when you are full of passion, and I hope to always maintain a passionate state.

experience.title: Experience
experience.seniorDesc: Leading a team of developers in building complex web applications using React and Node.js. Developing advanced user interfaces and optimizing performance. Implementing microservices architecture and CI/CD pipelines.
experience.frontendDesc: Developed interactive user interfaces using React and Vue.js. Worked on improving user experience and performance optimization. Collaborated with designers to implement pixel-perfect designs.
experience.juniorDesc: Developed websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Learned best practices in web development. Worked on various client projects and gained experience in modern web technologies.

projects.title: Projects
projects.ecommerceDesc: A complete e-commerce platform with payment integration and advanced inventory management.
projects.taskManagementDesc: A web application for task management with real-time synchronization and modern design.
projects.blogDesc: A modern blog platform with CMS features and beautiful UI design.
